item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
# ContextFS 0.1.1
Patch release — adds the running app version to the menu-bar popover.
## What's new
- **Menu-bar version label.** The popover now shows `v<version>` (or `v<version> (<build>)` when build differs) next to the "ContextFS" header. Easier to confirm which version you're running and to verify Sparkle auto-updates have applied.
## Install
**Mac app (recommended)**:
```bash brew install --cask Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/contextfs ```
**CLI only**:
```bash brew install Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/contextfs ```
Already installed via the cask? The app's Sparkle updater will offer 0.1.1 the next time it polls, or click **Check for Updates…** from the menu-bar popover.
## Requirements
- macOS 26.0 or later (FSKit backend) - macOS 15.4 or later (NFS backend fallback) - Apple Silicon or Intel Mac

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
# ContextFS 0.1.0
First public release of ContextFS — a read-only, mountable filesystem for cloning-free access to Git repos, npm packages, PyPI packages, and crates.io crates.
## Install
**Mac app (recommended for most users)** — bundles the CLI and the menu-bar companion:
```bash brew install --cask Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/contextfs ```
**CLI only (headless / CI)** — no Mac app, no menu bar:
```bash brew install Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/contextfs ```
The cask and formula can't be installed side-by-side — the cask already ships the CLI bundled inside the app, on `$PATH`.
Or download the DMG / tarball directly from the [GitHub Releases page](https://github.com/Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/releases).
## Requirements
- macOS 26.0 or later (FSKit backend) - macOS 15.4 or later (NFS backend fallback) - Apple Silicon or Intel Mac
## What's in the box
- `ctxfs` CLI — mount, list, unmount, diag, update - `ContextFS.app` — menu bar companion, onboarding wizard, preferences window - FSKit extension (macOS 26+) — no sudo, no Full Disk Access required - NFS v3 loopback fallback for older macOS
## Known limitations
- macOS only (Linux CLI is Phase 3.5) - Extension binary changes require a reboot (Apple FSKit constraint) - Read-only mounts only — write support is post-1.0
## Getting help
- Docs: https://github.com/Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/blob/main/README.md - Issues: https://github.com/Derek-X-Wang/ctxfs/issues
